description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a casual urban appearance. She wears a fitted short-sleeve t-shirt featuring a cartoonish graphic on the chest, paired with slim-fit jeans that are slightly wrinkled at the knees and ankles. Her footwear consists of low-top sneakers with visible socks. The figure has long, straight hair that falls past her shoulders and wears large, rectangular eyeglasses. Her arms are relaxed and slightly bent at the elbows, and her facial features are simplified but expressive. The overall look is modern and approachable, suitable for a city or neighborhood environment.
description: A casually dressed adult woman with long hair, glasses, a graphic t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graphic t-shirt, eyeglasses, facial features, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hair length, and the fit of the t-shirt and jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hair, t-shirt, jeans, and the heel detail of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm position, and the overall silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: casual t-shirt and slim-fit jeans with low-top sneakers and eyeglasses
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with side part
